'''Ilippi Skirata''', born '''Ilippi Jiro''', was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] of non-[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] origin, and the wife of Mandalorian [[Kal Skirata]]. Kal met her in a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] nightclub where she worked as a waitress. When they got [[Marriage/Legends|married]], they had a townhouse on [[Shuror]] where Kal tried to teach Ilippi how to build a basic field shelter or cook in an open fire.

Due to not taking up the Mandalorian culture, Ilippi did not understand her husband and could not tolerate his long absences on [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] missions. When Kal decided to start teaching their sons about the Mandalorian life, she took her children–[[Tor Skirata|Tor]], [[Ijaat Skirata|Ijaat]], and [[Ruusaan Skirata|Ruusaan]]–and left her husband. She died at some point prior to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].
